tasks.name: Environment Setup & Code Scaffolding
tasks.description: Verify conda env sibyl_ttt-dlm on cs8000d. Install/update dependencies. Create BSD and RACFG code modules with shared evaluation harness (accuracy, rep-2/3, distinct-1/2/3, length stats, qualitative samples). Verify Dream-7B model loads correctly.

pilot.pass_criteria: Model loads and generates 1 sample without error

tasks.name: A-CFG Reproduction on Dream-7B
tasks.description: Reproduce A-CFG (arXiv 2505.20199) on Dream-7B with Countdown-100. Implement confidence-based re-masking for unconditional input construction, fixed guidance weight w=1.0. This validates that CFG works on Dream-7B before investing in RACFG. Decision Gate 1: if accuracy < vanilla, switch all CFG experiments to LLaDA-8B.

pilot.pass_criteria: Accuracy > vanilla AND no degeneration (rep-3 < vanilla + 20%)

tasks.name: BSD Pilot — Belief Vector Feasibility
tasks.description: Implement BSD core: replace mask embeddings with EMA-evolved belief vectors during denoising Phase 1 (steps T to k+1, k=T/2). L2 normalize belief vectors to mask_emb norm. Test on Countdown-16 to verify: (1) no OOD collapse, (2) belief entropy decreases, (3) outputs are well-formed. If OOD collapse detected, activate fallback_beta mixing.

pilot.pass_criteria: Outputs are well-formed (rep-3 < 2x vanilla) AND belief entropy shows decreasing trend

visualizations.description: Belief entropy trajectory across denoising steps

tasks.name: RACFG Pilot — Stability-Guided Re-masking
tasks.description: Implement RACFG: cross-step JSD stability scoring, stability-guided re-masking (m=10%), temporal scheduling (w=0 at mask_rate>70%, linear ramp to w_max=1.5 at mask_rate<30%). Test on Countdown-16 to verify stability signals are meaningful and guidance improves accuracy.

pilot.pass_criteria: Accuracy >= vanilla AND stability scores show meaningful variance across positions

visualizations.description: Position-wise stability scores across denoising steps

tasks.name: DMI Baseline Reproduction
tasks.description: Reproduce DMI (our iteration 3 method) on Countdown-100 with seed 42 to confirm 9.3% baseline. Use existing code from task_3a_dmi_pilot.py as reference. This establishes the baseline that BSD must beat.

tasks.name: BSD k-Parameter Ablation (Hard-Reveal Steps)
tasks.description: Test BSD with k ∈ {T/4, T/2, 3T/4} on Countdown-100. k=T/4 means 75% belief refinement + 25% hard reveal; k=3T/4 means 25% belief + 75% hard reveal. Fixed alpha_schedule=linear(0.1→0.8), tau=linear(1.0→0.3). Hypothesis H3: intermediate k is optimal.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 3 configs produce well-formed outputs AND at least one > vanilla

tasks.name: BSD Alpha Schedule Ablation
tasks.description: Test BSD alpha schedules on Countdown-100 with best k from ablation_bsd_k. Schedules: (1) linear ramp 0.1→0.8, (2) cosine ramp, (3) constant 0.3, (4) constant 0.5. Fixed tau=linear(1.0→0.3).

pilot.pass_criteria: At least one schedule > vanilla AND no degeneration

tasks.name: RACFG Re-mask Percentage Ablation
tasks.description: Test RACFG with re-mask m% ∈ {5%, 10%, 20%} on Countdown-100. Fixed w_base=1.0, linear temporal schedule, JSD stability signals. Hypothesis: 10% is near-optimal (enough signal without over-masking).

pilot.pass_criteria: At least one m% > A-CFG baseline

tasks.name: RACFG Temporal Schedule Ablation
tasks.description: Test RACFG temporal schedules on Countdown-100 with best m% from ablation_racfg_remask_pct. Schedules: (1) fixed w=1.0, (2) linear ramp (0→w_max), (3) cosine ramp, (4) threshold_70_30 (from theory). Hypothesis H6: scheduled > fixed by ≥2pp.

pilot.pass_criteria: At least one scheduled variant > fixed w by ≥1pp

tasks.name: RACFG vs A-CFG Direct Comparison (Stability vs Confidence)
tasks.description: Direct comparison: RACFG (JSD stability re-masking) vs A-CFG (single-step confidence re-masking) on Countdown-100 at equal compute (both 2x FLOPs). Use best RACFG config from prior ablations. Hypothesis H5: JSD-based > confidence-based by ≥2pp.

tasks.name: BSD Full-Scale Evaluation (Countdown-500, 3 seeds)
tasks.description: Evaluate best BSD config on Countdown-500 with seeds {42, 123, 456}. Compare vs vanilla, DMI. McNemar test for significance. Hypothesis H1: BSD ≥ 14% (vs DMI 9.3%, vanilla 4.7%). Record belief entropy trajectories for analysis.

visualizations.description: BSD vs DMI vs vanilla on Countdown-500 (3 seeds)
Belief entropy trajectory comparison (BSD vs vanilla proxy)

tasks.name: RACFG Full-Scale Evaluation (Countdown-500, 3 seeds)
tasks.description: Evaluate best RACFG config on Countdown-500 with seeds {42, 123, 456}. Compare vs vanilla, A-CFG. McNemar test. Hypothesis H4: RACFG ≥ 15%. Include compute-fair comparison (RACFG at 2x vs vanilla at 2x steps).

visualizations.description: RACFG vs A-CFG vs vanilla on Countdown-500 (3 seeds)

tasks.name: BSD + RACFG Combination (Countdown-500, 3 seeds)
tasks.description: Combine best BSD + best RACFG: BSD belief refinement in early steps, RACFG guidance in late steps. Evaluate on Countdown-500, seeds {42, 123, 456}. Hypothesis H7: combination ≥ 18%, > max(BSD, RACFG). Include compute-fair comparison (2.1x FLOPs vs vanilla 2.1x steps).

visualizations.description: Main results: all methods on Countdown-500

tasks.name: Compute-Fair Comparison
tasks.description: Fair comparison at equal compute budgets: (1) BSD (~1.1x) vs vanilla with 1.1x more steps, (2) RACFG (~2x) vs vanilla with 2x steps, (3) BSD+RACFG (~2.1x) vs vanilla 2.1x steps, (4) vs ReMDM (~1.5x) with 1.5x steps. Countdown-500, 3 seeds. Hypothesis H11.

pilot.pass_criteria: Methods outperform vanilla at equal FLOPs

tasks.name: GSM8K Generalization Test
tasks.description: Evaluate best method (BSD/RACFG/combination) on GSM8K-1319 with seed 42. Hypothesis H8: significant improvement over vanilla Dream-7B. If Countdown results are strong, test all 3 methods; otherwise test only the best. Report accuracy with Bootstrap 95% CI.

pilot.pass_criteria: Accuracy > vanilla Dream-7B on GSM8K subset

tasks.name: Belief Entropy Trajectory Analysis
tasks.description: Detailed information-theoretic analysis of BSD belief evolution on Countdown-500: (1) per-position entropy at each denoising step, (2) Spearman rank correlation (step vs entropy), (3) terminal entropy comparison vs vanilla, (4) entropy vs accuracy correlation. Hypothesis H2: monotonically decreasing entropy, lower terminal entropy than vanilla.

pilot.pass_criteria: Entropy trajectory shows clear decreasing trend (Spearman rho < -0.8)

visualizations.description: Belief entropy trajectory (BSD vs vanilla effective entropy)

tasks.name: Token-Level CFG Impact Analysis
tasks.description: Qualitative and quantitative analysis of RACFG guidance effects: (1) which token positions are most affected by CFG, (2) stability score distribution analysis, (3) guidance magnitude heatmaps, (4) comparison of JSD-selected vs confidence-selected positions. Save 50 sample-level diagnostic outputs.

pilot.pass_criteria: Diagnostics data saved successfully with meaningful patterns

visualizations.description: Guidance magnitude per position across denoising steps
Distribution of stability scores at different mask rates

tasks.name: Statistical Analysis & Significance Tests
tasks.description: Comprehensive statistical analysis on all full-scale results: (1) McNemar tests for all method pairs, (2) Bonferroni correction, (3) Bootstrap 95% CI for accuracy differences (10,000 resamples), (4) difficulty-stratified subgroup analysis (easy/medium/hard Countdown problems). Generate publication-ready statistical tables.

pilot.pass_criteria: All statistical tests computed without error
